# Alex Merced's Lakehouse Blog

> A comprehensive blog and knowledge base focused on the Data Lakehouse ecosystem, Apache Iceberg, Dremio, Data Engineering, and Agentic workflows. Authored by Alex Merced.

## Key Themes and Technologies
- **Apache Iceberg:** Deep dives, tutorials, and architectural patterns for using the open table format.
- **Dremio:** Guides and use cases for the Lakehouse engine and catalog.
- **Python & Data Engineering:** Workflows utilizing PyArrow, Polars, PySpark, DuckDB, and other modern data processing frameworks.
- **Generative AI & Agentic Workflows:** Exploring how LLMs and autonomous agents integrate with data engineering pipelines.

## Site Structure & Content
The blog is updated regularly with tutorials, deep dives, industry news, and best practices. All posts are structured to highlight high-value technical FAQs aimed at empowering data practitioners.

### Core Topics:
- Data Lakehouse
- Apache Iceberg
- Dremio
- Data Engineering
- Python
- SQL
- Rust

## About the Author
Alex Merced is a seasoned Developer Advocate and Data Engineer, specializing in open source Data Lakehouse architectures. He frequently publishes definitive guides, tutorials, and crash courses on Apache Iceberg and Dremio.

- [Twitter/X](https://www.twitter.com/amdatalakehouse)
